cityDNA.coreFantasy: A surface mountain dwarven fortress-industrial capital where walls, roads, forges, command yards, caravan depots, and containment keeps make craft public.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Khaz Vorem is not a default underground dwarf cave city; it is a visible mountain civic machine with deep underworks as roots beneath surface infrastructure.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Khaz Vorem makes durability, maintenance, defense, supply, command, and containment the proof of civic worth.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Iron, granite, basalt, brass, arcane glow, mountain terraces, forge halls, viaducts, stone bridges, square towers, gatehouses, command keeps, caravan roads, and warded containment vaults.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Dwarven civic culture of masons, smiths, commanders, caravan brokers, wardens, and bridgewrights.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Hammers, anvils, hammer marks, iron veins, border beacons, forge smoke, command standards, caravan gates, and warded vaults symbolize infrastructure as civic worth.

canonLocks: Wonder: Dwarven Deep-Anvil Throne of the Iron Vein.
Seat of Power: Hammer Marks Iron Mandate Keep.
Districts: Fortress / Border Wall, Heavy Industry / Foundry, Military Command, Transit / Caravan / Rail, Prison / Containment.

Exact uploaded anchors include Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook, Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge, Smoke-Stack Monument, Crucible Hall Nook, Military Command Hall, Command Bastion, Standard Tower Nook, Transit / Caravan / Rail Civic Hall, Caravanserai, Waystation Hall Nook, Prison / Containment Civic Hall, Containment Keep, Mist Veils Monument, and Judgment Yard Nook.
provisionalCanon: The city's highest virtue is craftsmanship.
The image pass confirms surface terraces, roads, walls, and public works as the first read.
cautionFlags: Use deep underworks as roots, not default setting.

environment.environmentalLogic: The uploaded images show mountain terrain transformed into roads, walls, ramps, forges, gates, bridges, and public thresholds.

forms: Dwarven Deep-Anvil Throne of the Iron Vein
skyline: Hammer Marks Iron Mandate Keep as authority
forge stacks, command towers, caravan gates, and containment keeps across terraces

civilization.people: Dwarven citizens are grounded, practical, guild-aware, command-disciplined, and quick to judge whether a thing is load-bearing.
civilization.governance: The Hammer Marks Iron Mandate Keep governs through guild councils, public works, defense, supply, and containment rulings.
civilization.religion: Forge runes, hammer marks, maker memory, and iron vein symbolism carry civic-sacred weight.

streets.appearance: Heavy, engineered, and public with terrace roads, gates, bridgeheads, forge yards, command banners, caravan depots, containment walls, hoists, and maker marks.
streets.movement: Movement follows roads, ramps, lifts, bridges, gates, command stairs, forge paths, and containment checkpoints.
streets.lighting: Furnace orange, beacon blue, lantern arches, and containment pale light structure night.
streets.weatherEffects: Rain darkens stone and makes vents steam; fog makes signals essential.
streets.dayCycle: Forge ignition, gate checks, command posts, caravan prep, and public works movement dominate day.
streets.nightCycle: Furnace glow, guarded walls, blue beacon light, and containment watch dominate night.

housing.wealthy: Guild-master and mandate homes embedded in terraces with carved lintels and heavy doors.
housing.middle: Workshop homes and caravan-family apartments near roads and guild counters.
housing.poor: Underworks-edge rooms and labor quarters near forge noise and cargo ramps.

districts.name: Fortress / Border Wall
districts.civicPurpose: Access control, warning, defensive gates, and first signal system.
districts.visualIdentity: Fortress / Border Wall Civic Hall, Border Wall Beacon, Woven Banners Monument, Watch Bastion Nook.

districts.name: Heavy Industry / Foundry
districts.civicPurpose: Production, toolmaking, forge labor, and material proof.
districts.visualIdentity: Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge, Smoke-Stack Monument, Crucible Hall Nook.

districts.name: Military Command
districts.civicPurpose: Rank, musters, armories, and disciplined public force.
districts.visualIdentity: Military Command Hall, Command Bastion, Woven Banners Monument, Standard Tower Nook.

districts.name: Transit / Caravan / Rail
districts.civicPurpose: Overland logistics, arrival, route law, and cargo movement.
districts.visualIdentity: Transit / Caravan / Rail Civic Hall, Caravanserai, Woven Banners Monument, Waystation Hall Nook.

districts.name: Prison / Containment
districts.civicPurpose: Custody, judgment, warded danger management, and consequence.
districts.visualIdentity: Prison / Containment Civic Hall, Containment Keep, Mist Veils Monument, Judgment Yard Nook.

wonder.name: Dwarven Deep-Anvil Throne of the Iron Vein
wonder.symbolicRole: Mountain, forge, road, deep underworks, and public craft converging.
wonder.visualRole: Stone-and-forge wonder integrated into the mountain face with terraces, bridges, and furnace glow.
wonder.civicRole: Guild ceremonies, forge rites, public works announcements, and civic festivals of craft.
storyHooks: A repair seam on the Throne proves an old failure became civic pride.

beacon.name: Border Wall Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: Signal tied to defended thresholds and orderly response.
beacon.visualRole: Stone-and-metal signal integrated with wall, banners, and blue glow.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates gates, guild response, forge timing, caravan pauses, and wall defense.
storyHooks: A Beacon state makes every gate, forge, and caravan move in sequence.

seatOfPower.name: Hammer Marks Iron Mandate Keep
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Craft authority and mandate law made government.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Central keep of iron, granite, basalt, brass, hammer marks, archives, and command platforms.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Guild councils, trade arbitration, public works, defensive command, caravan negotiations, and repair decisions.
storyHooks: A maintenance ledger has more force than a proclamation.

majorLandmarks.name: Great Forge
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Forge halls, smoke stacks, crucible court, molten channels.
storyHooks: A forge quota exposes who controls the city.

majorLandmarks.name: Command Bastion
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Command keep, standards, shields, armory halls.
storyHooks: A standard is raised before inspection is complete.

majorLandmarks.name: Caravanserai
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Caravan yard, route maps, signal flags, depots, awnings.
storyHooks: A route tally changes which gate stays open.

majorLandmarks.name: Containment Keep
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Warded keep, mist veils, judgment yard, cell blocks.
storyHooks: A judgment yard mark proves containment was once protection.

S2: Heavy Industry / Foundry Civic Hall, Great Forge, Smoke-Stack Monument, Crucible Hall Nook.
S3: Military Command Hall, Command Bastion, Woven Banners Monument, Standard Tower Nook.

mapBackgroundGuidance: Keep Deep-Anvil Throne, Border Wall Beacon, and Hammer Marks Iron Mandate Keep legible together.
Use visible surface terraces, roads, walls, forge smoke, command bastions, caravan gates, and containment yards.
requiredVisualElements: Dwarven Deep-Anvil Throne of the Iron Vein
